messages: VICTORIA UNDERGROUND STATION: From Wednesday 11 March until late May, there will be a reduced escalator service to the Victoria line due to replacement works.

Victoria Station: No Step Free Access - Step free access is not available to/from the Cardinal Place entrance due to a faulty lift. Use the entrance at the National Rail station for step free access. Call 0343 222 1234 if you need further help.
